name: @umbraculum/api-client
description: Typed API client with pluggable auth strategies (cookie sessions for web; bearer tokens for native + Node). The transport layer between any client and services/api. Returned payloads are runtime-validated by parsers from @umbraculum/contracts. Platform-classified per sub-plan #9 §1.1 — no brewery-domain logic.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/brewery/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
